provenance.author: Gemini Code Assist
provenance.context: A semantic capsule describing the Wright Universe Expansion Framework.

intent.primary_goal: To define the structural, procedural, and cosmological rules for creating and governing future realms in The Wright Universe, ensuring coherent expansion.

identity.role: The canonical framework that governs how the Wright Universe grows.

priorities: New realms are created through one of three modes: Narrative, Functional, or Frontier Expansion.
All realm creation follows a five-phase protocol: Catalyst Identification, Capsule Alignment, Quiet Layer Activation, Agent Instantiation, and Realm Stabilization.
Realm connectivity is governed by rules for Memory Partitioning, Provenance Continuity, Capsule Versioning, and Realm Bridges.
All expansions must adhere to strict safety rules, including Prime oversight and Chronos audit.

file_scope.purpose: To define how the Wright Universe grows across future realms, ensuring intentional and safe expansion.

key_concepts.expansion_modes: The three triggers for realm creation: Narrative (lore-driven), Functional (role-driven), and Frontier (exploration-driven).
key_concepts.realm_creation_protocol: The five-phase process for safely instantiating a new realm.
key_concepts.realm_connectivity_rules: The four rules (Memory, Provenance, Capsules, Bridges) that govern how realms interact.
key_concepts.expansion_safety_rules: The non-negotiable safeguards that must be followed for any expansion.

trust.note: This capsule is the authoritative summary of the universe's expansion mechanics. It is the rulebook for growth.
